description: Agent-based system that transforms a business discovery call into a complete AI training infrastructure. One extraction call → owner game plan, company adoption doc, role-specific training tracks, CLAUDE.md configs, VA guide, and self-installing delivery repo.
key_components: agents/ — 6 agent playbooks (orchestrator, extraction, training-builder, coaching-setup, delivery-packager, expert-series)
config/ — project config, thresholds, per-client JSON
templates/ — output templates (owner, company, roles, va)
fragile_areas: config/clients/ — client data files; never overwrite without explicit instruction
outputs/ — client deliverables; quality check before packaging
lib/run-agent.sh — core runner; changes affect all agents
templates/ — source of truth for output format; changes affect all future clients
